headline: Delta earnings, FOMC minutes, Fed commentary: What to Watch
summary: Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre takes a look at the top stories for investors to watch on Wednesday, Apr. 8.Delta (DAL) and Constellation Brands (STZ) are reporting quarterly earnings, new Federal Reserve commentary is expected from San Francisco President Mary Daly, and FOMC minutes from the Fed's most recent meeting will be released.

headline: Top Procurement & Supply Chain Leaders Set to Speak in Chicago This Month
summary: London, 07/04/2026 – BizClik, Procurement Magazine and Supply Chain Digital have announced a strong lineup of industry leaders that will take the stage at Procurement & Supply Chain LIVE: The US Summit. Taking place at Navy Pier, Chicago, on 21-22 April 2026, the speaker line-up features executives from leading global organisations including PepsiCo, Constellation Brands, Regions Bank, Coinbase, Reynolds American, Trane Technologies, and BDO USA. headline: Is Constellation Brands (STZ) Pricing Offer A Fresh Chance After Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: Wondering whether Constellation Brands is priced for opportunity or risk right now? This article breaks down what the current share price may be implying about value. The stock last closed at US$155.25, with returns of 2.8% over 7 days, 6.0% over 30 days, 10.0% year to date, and longer-term returns of negative 7.7% over 1 year, negative 26.7% over 3 years, and negative 25.3% over 5 years.
